videos.title: 500 people vibe-coded for 30 days. I was one of them. - Sanja Grbic, Automattic
videos.summary: This video offers a fascinating insider look at how a 1,400-person tech company successfully upskilled over 500 employees to use AI coding tools in just 30 days. It is a must-watch for anyone interested in organizational agility, showing how AI can transform designers into design engineers and shift the role of traditional software engineers from builders to strategic enablers.

timestamps.topic: How Automattic structured AI enablement for non-technical employees
The shift from engineer-as-builder to engineer-as-enabler
Transitioning from traditional design processes to AI-driven design engineering

videos.title: Ambil credit card untuk credit score?
videos.summary: This video breaks down the practical realities of building a credit score in Malaysia, helping young professionals understand how banks view creditworthiness. Instead of just getting a credit card blindly, the speaker explains alternative ways to build credit and how to maximize card benefits wisely.

timestamps.topic: What a credit score actually means to banks
The true cost of owning a credit card if you don't use it
Three everyday ways to build your credit score besides credit cards

videos.title: [S01:E15] Founder Supercube jana RM20 Juta dalam masa setahun? - Hayfa Amira, Founder Supercube
videos.summary: This video features an insightful interview with Hayfa Amira, the founder of Supercube International, as she shares her journey of building a successful wellness brand from scratch. Aspiring entrepreneurs will learn valuable lessons on navigating business challenges, such as dealing with counterfeit products and the strategic transition from an agent-based model to affiliate marketing. It's a must-watch for anyone looking to build a sustainable, value-driven business with a clear long-term vision.

timestamps.topic: Transitioning from Engineering to Business
How the Founder's Engineering Background Aids Decision-Making in Business
Building Supercube and Educating the Market on Artisan Functional Tea

videos.title: Only Hundreds of Engineers Have This Skill (Nebius CTO)
videos.summary: This video features a candid discussion with Danila Shtan, CTO of Nebius, who debunks the hype around fully autonomous AI coding agents and explains why human oversight remains essential for production-grade software. It is a must-watch for tech leaders and developers looking to understand the realistic boundaries of agentic AI and how to integrate it safely into engineering workflows.

timestamps.topic: Why working with an AI agent is like managing a junior engineer
The challenge of AI-assisted interview cheating and why onsite interviews are returning
The limits of agentic autonomy and why code must ultimately be owned by humans

videos.title: EP204 | Analisis Kempen PRN Johor 2026, Future Speaks
videos.summary: This video offers a deep dive into the political dynamics of Johor, analyzing the strategic moves of key coalitions like Barisan Nasional (BN) and Pakatan Harapan (PH) ahead of the state elections. The hosts unpack how economic track records, voter turnout statistics, and the strategic positioning of parties—particularly in relation to PAS and DAP—will heavily influence the final outcome. It's an insightful watch for anyone wanting to understand the complex tactical games and calculations that shape Malaysian politics.

timestamps.topic: Johor's impressive economic performance under BN's administration
How voter turnout, especially among Chinese voters, is the wildcard for the election outcome
The strategic trap of trying to claim credit for opponents' successes rather than offering a distinct alternative

videos.title: Why Malaysian Tech Startup Companies Failed (and What’s Changing Now)?
videos.summary: This video takes an insightful and honest look at why Malaysia's initial tech startup boom in the 2010s faltered, examining critical errors like risk aversion, grant dependency, and talent drain. It then transitions into an encouraging exploration of how a new, battle-tested generation of entrepreneurs is spearheading a second tech wave, building resilient, globally minded companies. It's a must-watch for anyone interested in the realities of building businesses in emerging markets.

timestamps.topic: The risk aversion trap: why cloning existing business models limited innovation in Malaysia.
Grant dependency and 'grantpreneurs': how seeking funding over customer acquisition stymied growth.
Talent drain: why Malaysia's top developers and data scientists often leave for international markets.

videos.title: Draining Johor's Water? Inside Malaysia's Push To Build AI Factories | Insight
videos.summary: This video is a must-watch for anyone interested in the future of technology and global economics, as it explores Malaysia's ambitious bid to become Southeast Asia's next AI powerhouse. Viewers will learn about the rapid expansion of massive, state-of-the-art data centers in Johor and the development of localized AI models designed for Malaysian language and culture. The core takeaway is that while Malaysia’s AI boom presents immense economic opportunities, it faces critical hurdles like severe strains on local water and power resources, as well as a pressing talent shortage.

timestamps.topic: Developing localized AI models for Malaysian culture
How AI data centers operate and their massive resource demands
Why Johor, Malaysia is uniquely positioned as a regional tech hub

videos.title: “Don’t start a company just because you want to IPO” - Pinn Yang, Foodie Media CEO | In The Studio
videos.summary: This video features an insightful interview with the co-founders of Foodie Media, tracing their remarkable journey from a tiny 1-ringgit-a-day side hustle in 2016 to a powerhouse digital media company that raised 75 million ringgit in its recent IPO. It is an excellent watch for aspiring entrepreneurs because it breaks down the "4C" business model (Content, Creator, Commerce, Community) and reveals how they leveraged personal branding and authentic storytelling to scale across Southeast Asia. The core takeaway is that sustainable growth comes from obsessing over audience trust, adapting to new content formats, and building structured internal systems rather than chasing an IPO as a starting goal.

timestamps.topic: The evolution from a minor blog to a major 75 million ringgit IPO
Deep dive into Foodie Media's 4C business model (Content, Creator, Commerce, Community)
How old-school selling philosophies and personal IP drive modern digital commerce

videos.title: How AI Affects Islamic Knowledge | Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: This thought-provoking video explores the chilling reality of how Artificial Intelligence could quietly degrade the depth of spiritual leadership. It challenges viewers to consider a future where imams and scholars rely on automated prompts rather than rigorous personal study, ultimately diluting the authenticity of community guidance. The core takeaway is a call to protect genuine scholarship and value the demanding journey of acquiring true, heart-led knowledge.

timestamps.topic: How AI could subtly replace the role of an Imam
The contrast between modern convenience and the rigorous study of past scholars

videos.title: MCP Apps: Primitives, discovery, and the Future of Software - Pietro Zullo, Manufact, Inc
videos.summary: This video introduces Model Context Protocol (MCP) Apps, explaining how they return interactive UI widgets instead of raw JSON to enable richer agentic workflows. By exploring key interaction primitives and real-world examples, the speaker demonstrates how MCP apps are reshaping software distribution through AI platforms.

timestamps.topic: Understanding MCP Apps versus standard MCP servers
Timeline and evolution of MCP-UI into MCP Apps
Architectural overview of how MCP Apps render sandboxed widgets

videos.title: How to get tough feedback from someone who cares about you | Chris Wheatley | TEDxSpokane
videos.summary: This engaging talk by Chris Wheatley reveals how embracing tough feedback can spark profound personal and professional transformation, even in our closest relationships. Through humorous personal stories and a practical framework called TACT, Wheatley explains how we can make it safer and easier for others to share the hard truths we need to hear. It is a must-watch for anyone looking to build deeper trust, improve communication, and overcome the barriers of defensiveness.

timestamps.topic: How 'You're Doing Your Thing' transformed a friendship and marriage
How titles and power dynamics create barriers to honest feedback
Introducing the TACT framework for receiving feedback

videos.title: The Reward of Your “Invisible” Work | LATEST Khutbah by Sh. Mohammad Elshinawy
videos.summary: This video explores the profound Islamic concept that no good deed or effort is ever wasted in the sight of Allah, drawing from Quranic verses and the story of Prophet Yusuf (Joseph). The speaker delivers a powerful reminder that while worldly recognition is never guaranteed, true fulfillment and divine reward are assured for those who persevere with piety and patience. It is an inspiring message for anyone seeking motivation to continue doing good, even when their efforts go unnoticed by others.

timestamps.topic: Understanding that Allah never wastes the reward of the righteous
The assurance that Allah always appreciates your efforts
How every small act of patience and fatigue is recorded for reward

videos.title: WF26: Harness Engineering & Startup Battlefield ft. Garry Tan, Mike Krieger, @t3dotgg , DSPy
videos.summary: Step into the minds of elite tech leaders and startup gurus. As a junior developer, this gives you a front-row seat to the future of software engineering, toolchains like DSPy, and how to build high-impact applications that investors actually care about.

videos.title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1: Software Factories & Keynotes
videos.summary: The future of development is shifting from manual coding to building and managing 'software factories'. This keynote provides a crucial macro view of how AI is transforming the fullstack engineering workflow, helping you position your skills ahead of the curve.

videos.title: Building Great Agent Skills: The Missing Manual
videos.summary: This video offers a practical framework for developers to escape 'skill hell' and write high-quality AI engineering skills. It delivers a four-part checklist—covering triggers, structure, steering, and pruning—to help you build efficient and predictable AI agents.

timestamps.topic: The Problem of Skill Hell
User-Invoked vs. Model-Invoked Skills
Structuring and Steering AI Skills
